get.summary: Gets all visible events on the calendar.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The position at which to begin fetching events.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of events to fetch.

parameters.name: orderby
parameters.description:
The fields to order the returned events by.  Use the +/- characters before a field
name to specify ascending/descending order, respectively.  Multiple fields can be
specified by separating each field by a comma. Only "StartDate" is currently supported.

A collection of calendar conflicts that match the search criteria
A set of times that the selected teacher(s) are available for open event booking

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The position at which to begin obtaining families.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The number of families to obtain.

parameters.name: orderby
parameters.description:
The fields to order the returned families by.  Use the +/- characters before a field
name to specify ascending/descending order, respectively.  Multiple fields can be
specified by separating each field by a comma.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description:
The fields in each returned family object that are to also be loaded.  If a field is
not specified then its value will be null.  Multiple fields can be specified by
separating each field by a comma.  The fields are listed below.

AutoInvoiceSettings: The automatic invoice settings of the family.

Balance=yyyy-mm-dd: The balance that the family owes as of the specified date in which
yyyy is the four digit year, mm is the two digit month and dd is the two digit day.
For example, Balance=2020-05-27

BlockedRecipientType: Sets the BlockedReceipientType field of EmailInformationDisplayItem
and TelephoneInformationDisplayItem field types in each object in the Parents and Students
collections.  The BlockedReceipientType field defines the blocked state of an email address
or telephone number.

InvoiceBalance: Sets the InvoiceBalance field of the AutoInvoiceSettings object in each
family object.  The InvoiceBalance is the balance that the family owes on their next invoice.

LastInvoiceDate: The date of the last invoice recieved by the family.
            
LastPaymentDate: The date of the last payment made by the family.
            
Parents: A collection of parents that belong to the family.
 
Students: A collection of students that belong to the family.

BlockedRecipientType: Sets the BlockedReceipientType field of EmailInformationDisplayItem

or telephone number.

InvoiceBalance: Sets the InvoiceBalance field of the AutoInvoiceSettings object in each

LastInvoiceDate: The date of the last invoice recieved by the family.
            
LastPaymentDate: The date of the last payment made by the family.

separating each field by a comma.  The fields are listed below.

Method: The payment method of the transaction.

Description: A description of the transaction.

Taxes: A collection of taxes that are for the transaction.

name to specify ascending/descending order, respectively.  Multiple fields can be
specified by separating each field by a comma.

OriginalChargeAmount.description:
This property represents the fee for the lesson if the lesson were billable. The "Charge" object may be null if the attendance was changed
to a non-billable status.

SharedLocation.description:
If true, this location can be shared by multiple people and not cause a calendar conflict (for example, "FaceTime" or "Student's Home"). This property is useful for
showing blocked times on the calendar.

Type.description: An enumeration value that defines the type of the transaction.

Date.description: The date and time on which the transaction ocurred.

DisplayDescription.description:
A description of the transaction that includes calendar event details.  If the transaction
is not associated with a calendar event, then this field will contain no calendar event
details and will be qual to the Description field.

Method.description:
A brief description of the medium that was used to pay the transaction.  For example,
cash, credit card, etc.

AccountBalance.description: The balance that the family assigned to the transaction owes, as of the date in the Date field.

Charge.description:
The monetary amount of the transaction excluding taxes.  This field will only be set if
the Type field is set to Charge and will be null otherwise.

SalesTax.description:
The monetary amount of the total tax.This field will only be set if the Type field is set to
Charge and will be null otherwise.

HasTax.description: True if the transaction has at least one tax associated with it, false otherwise.

ChargeWithTax.description:
The monetary amount of the transaction including taxes.  This field is equal to the Charge
field plus the SalesTax field.  This field will only be set if the Type field is set to
Charge and will be null otherwise.

Payment.description:
The monetary amount of the transaction.  This field will only be set if the Type field
is set to Payment and will be null otherwise.

ID.description: The unique identifier of the transaction.

EventID.description:
The unique identifier of the event that the transaction belongs to.  If the transaction
is not assigned to an event, then this field will be null.

CategoryID.description:
The unique identifier of the event category that the transaction belongs to.  If the transaction
is not assigned to an event category, then this field will be null.

StudentID.description:
The unique identifier of the student that the transaction belongs to.  If the transaction
is not assigned to a student, then this field will be null.

FamilyID.description: The unique identifier of the family that the transaction belongs to.

TeacherID.description:
The unique identifier of the teacher that the transaction belongs to.  If the transaction
is not assigned to a teacher, then this field will be null.

HasCash.description: True if the transaction has a Cash object associated with it, false otherwise.

Taxes.description:
A collection containing the taxes that are associated with the transaction.  Only
transactions that have the Type field set to Charge or Discount will have taxes.

Editable.description: True if the transaction can be changed, false otherwise.

ManualRecurring.description: True if the transaction is recurring and is not for a calendar event, false otherwise.

CalendarBased.description: True if the transaction is for a calendar event, false otherwise.

FixedMonthlyCharge.description: True if the transaction is for a student that pays a monthly charge, false otherwise.

Active.description: True if the family is currently enabled and in use by the school.

AdultStudentParentID.description:
If a student is an adult, then they are assigned to a parent object.  This field is the
unique identifier of that parent object.  If a student is not an adult, then this field
will be null.

DateOfBirth.description:
The date of birth of the student.  If this field is null, then this date has not been
specified for the student.

DateStarted.description:
The date on which the student joined the school..  If this field is null, then this date
has not been specified for the student.

HasEmailAddress.description: True if the student has an email address, false otherwise.

FaceTimeID.description: A unique identifier of the student's Apple FaceTime account.

FamilyID.description: The unique identifier of the family that the student belongs to.

FirstName.description: The first name of the student.

FullName.description: The full name of the student, formatted according to the settings of the school.

HasProfilePicture.description: True if the student has a profile picture, false otherwise.

ID.description: The unique identifier of the student.

LastEventDate.description:
The date and time of the last calendar event that the student attended.  If this
field is null, then the student did not attend any calendar events in the past.

LastName.description: The last name of the student.

LocalSchool.description: A description of any other school that the student is attending.

ProfileHeadshotURL.description:
The URL of the profile picture of the version of the profile picture that is rezied
to be square and centered on the face of the student.  If this field is null, then
the student does not have a profile picture.  The HasProfilePicture field can be used
to determine whether a student has a profile picture.

ProfileThumbnailURL.description:
The URL of the thumbnail sized version of the profile picture of the student.  If this
field is null, then the student does not have a profile picture.  The HasProfilePicture
field can be used to determine whether a student has a profile picture.

ProfilePictureURL.description:
The URL of the original profile picture of the student.  If this field is null, then the
student does not have a profile picture.  The HasProfilePicture field can be used
to determine whether a student has a profile picture.

NextEventDate.description:
The date and time of the next calendar event that the student is attending.  If this
field is null, then the student is not attending any events in the future.

Note.description: A private note about the student.

Referrer.description: A description of the individual or organization that introduced the student to the school.

SendEmailReminders.description:
True if the student auotmatically receives emails reminding them of upcoming calendar
events that they are attending.

SendSMSReminders.description:
True if the student auotmatically receives text messages reminding them of upcoming calendar
events that they are attending.

SkillLevel.description:
A description of the level of experience of the student for the subjects they are
being taught.

SkypeUsername.description: A unique identifier of the student's Skype account.

StudentGroups.description: A collection containing the student groups that the student is assigned to.

SubjectTypes.description:
A collection containing the description of subjects that the student is interested in or
being taught.

AccessStatus.description: An enumeration value that identifies the login access status of the student.

HasMfa.description: Indicates if the user account has MFA enabled.

ParentAccessStatus.description: An enumeration value that identifies the maximal login access status of the student's parents.

LastLogin.description:
The date and time that the student last logged into the Student Portal.  This field will
be null if the student has not yet logged into the Student Portal.

Active.description: True if the family is currently enabled and in use by the school.

AutoInvoicePending.description: True if an automatic invoice is being sent to the family.

AutoInvoicingEnabled.description:
True if the family is configured to use automatic invoicing, false otherwise.  If this
field is set to true, then the automatic invoice settings will be specified in the
AutoInvoiceSettings field.

Balance.description: The balance that the family owes.

FamilyName.description: A comma separated list of the names of the parents in the family.

ID.description: The unique identifier of the family.

LastInvoiceDate.description: The date of the last invoice recieved by the family.

LastPaymentDate.description: The date of the last payment made by the family.

Parents.description: A collection that contains the parents assigned to the family.

StudentNames.description: A comma separated value that contains the full name of each student in the family.

Students.description: A collection that contains the students assigned to the family.

TimeZoneDisplayName.description: A description of the timezone that the family is located in.

TimeZoneID.description: A value that identifies the timezone that the family is located in.

PreferredInvoiceRecipientIDs.description: Preferred invoice recipient (i.e., parent) IDs for this family

ID.description: The unique identifier of the tax.

TaxDefinitionID.description: The unique identifier of the tax definition that the tax is assigned to.

Amount.description: The monetary amount of the tax.

Rate.description: The monetary rate of the tax.

CashID.description: The unique identifier of the cash entry that the tax is assigned to if applicable.

ReceivableID.description: The unique identifier of the receivable that the tax is assigned to if applicable.

EndDate.description:
The date on which the item stops repeating.  If this field is set to null, then the
item repeats indefinitely.

Frequency.description: An enumeration value that defines the repeating period type.

Interval.description:
How many periods, specified in the Frequency field, that the item repeats.  For example
if the Freqency field is set to Week and this field is set to 2, then the item repeats
every 2 weeks.  As another example, if the Frequency field is set to Month and this field
is set to 5, then the item repeats every 5 months.  This field must be set to a number
greater than zero and does not apply if the Frequency field is set to Daily.

MonthType.description:
An enumeration value that defines how the item repeats within each month when the Frequency
field is set to Monthly.  If the Frequency field is set to some other value then this field
does not apply.
If this field is set to Absolute, then the item repeats on the same day each month.
The day is specified in the DayOfMonth field.  For example, if this field is set to
Absolute and the DayOfMonth field is set to 17, then the item will repeat on the
17th of each month.
If this field is set to Relative, then
the item repeats on the same week day each month.  The week day is obtained from the
start date  of the item.  For example, if this field is set to Relative and the start
date of the item is set to March 17th, 2021 (the 3rd Wednesday in that month), then the
item will repeat on the 3rd Wednesday of each month.

BillingRate.description:
BillingRate indicates the default amount this student pays for lessons with the teacher (based on DefaultBillingMode). This value
may be null if the principal is not allowed to see billing information.

EmailInformationDisplayItem.description: Contains data for an email address.

BlockedRecipientType.description: An enumeration value that defines the blocked status of the email address.

EmailAddress.description: The email address that this object pertains to.

StudentGroupDisplayItem.description: Contains data for a student group.

ID.description: The unique identifier of the student group.

Name.description: The name of the student group.

Students.description: A collection that contains the students that are assigned to the student group.

TelephoneInformationDisplayItem.description: Contains data for a telephone number.

BlockedRecipientType.description: An enumeration value that defines the blocked status of the telephone number.

TelephoneNumber.description: The telephone number that this object pertains to.

TextingAllowed.description:
True if text messages are allowed to be sent to this telephone number, false otherwise.
This field does not indicate if the telephone number has text messaging enabled.

EventCategoryNameDisplayItem.description: A light-weight version of EventCategoryDisplayItem that is suitable for use in unathenticated contexts (i.e. the widgets and other external forms)

Fee.description: Currently only populated when a booking from an open booking slot

BatchBillingProfileInputItem.description: This class exists for symmetry (and extensibility) with the BulkBillingProfileUpdateItem

ExistingEvents.description:
If true, concrete events will be included in the result set. Set this to false if you plan to merge the result set
with existing calendar events fetched an alternate way.

RescheduleEventID.description:
If specified, booking slots will be returned that match the category AND duration of the original event. This usage is special
case and is here to facilitate "Reschedule" functionality.

EventID.description: Optional. Only provided if this item represents a concerete event on the teacher's calendar

StudentID.description: Optional. Only provided when the principal is an authenticated and a student is known.

HasFutureConflicts.description: Indicates that this event, if recurring, may have student/teacher/location conflicts in the future and may not always be available if this is booked.

OriginalEventID.description: Represents the held event that created this hold time

FamilySearchOptions.description: Contains filter criteria that are applied when searching for families.

TeacherIDs.description: Filters the search by teachers that the students of families are assigned to.

StudentGroupIDs.description: Filters the search by student groups that the students of familes are assigned to.

SearchText.description:
Filters the search by the specified text contained in the family name or the student
names of the students of families.

FamilyUpdateItem.description: Contains data that is used to update an existing family.

AutoInvoiceUpdateItem.description: Contains data that is used to update the automatic invoicing settings of a family.

NextInvoiceBillPeriod.description: The start date of the next invoicing period.

GenerateZeroAmountInvoices.description: Set to true if invoices are to be generated even when the family owes a balance of zero.

IncludeBalanceForwardOnInvoices.description:
Set to true if the balance that a family owed on the previous invoice and has not yet
paid, should be shown on the next invoice.

InvoicingMode.description: An enumeration value that identfies the way in which lessons are invoiced.

AutoEmailInvoices.description: Set to true if invoices are to be automatically emailed to a family.

AutoInvoiceFooter.description: The text that appears at the footer of an invoice.

InvoiceDateOffset.description:
This offset is used to determine the date on which an invoice is created.  This date is
equal to the date specified in the NextInvoiceBillPeriod field plus the number of days
specified in this field.  For example, if this field is set -3 then the invoice will be
created on 3 days before the date specified in the NextInvoiceBillPeriod field.  As another
example, if this field is set to 7 then the invoice will be created on 7 days after the date
specified in the NextInvoiceBillPeriod field.  A value of 0 indicates that the invoice is
created on the same date as that specified in the NextInvoiceBillPeriod field.

DueDateOffset.description:
This offset is used to determine the date on which payment for an invoice is due.
This date is equal to the date calculated from the InvoiceDateOffset field plus the
number of days specified in this field.  For example, if this field is set 3 and the
InvoiceDateOffset field is set to -7 then payment for the invoice is due on 4 days
(3 - 7 = -4) before the date specified in the NextInvoiceBillPeriod field.  As another
example, if this field is set to 5 and the InvoiceDateOffset field is set to 4 then
payment for the invoice is due on 9 days (5 + 4 = 9) after the date specified in the
NextInvoiceBillPeriod field.  A value of null or 0 indicates that payment for the invoice
is due on the same date as the creation of the invoice.  This field must be greater than
or equal to zero if it is specified.

InvoiceFormat.description: An enumeration value that identfies the level of detail to be shown in the invoice.

SingleUse.description: If true, this report can be fetched at most once. After that, the report is automatically deleted on the server side (auto-delete).

Title.description:
A human readable title for this placeholder. This is different than the sample text as this title
describes the parameter. The sample text provides an example usage.

BatchRepertoireAssignmentInputItem.description: This class exists for symmetry (and extensibility) with the BatchRepertoireAssignmentUpdateItem

SingleUse.description: If true, this report can be fetched at most once. After that, the report is automatically deleted on the server side (auto-delete).

TaxBalanceSummaryRequestItem.description: Contains criteria for obtaining the balance for a family.

TaxDefinitionID.description: The unique identifier of the family for which to get the balance.

FamilyInputItem.description: Contains data that is used to create a new family.

TimeZoneID.description:
A value that identifies the timezone that the family is located in.  Set this field to
null if the family should have the same timezone as the school.

Active.description: Indicates if the search is limited to active billing profiles (i.e. student is actively assigned to the teacher).

EventCategoryID.description: The unique identifier of the event category that is being overridden.

TeacherID.description: The unique identifier of the teacher that the payroll override is assigned to.

EventCategoryID.description: The unique identifier of the event category that is being overridden.

TeacherID.description: The unique identifier of the teacher that the payroll override is assigned to.

TransactionInputItem.description: Contains data that is used to create a new transaction.

TransactionType.description: An enumeration value that identifies the type of the transaction.

FamilyID.description: The unique identifier of the family that the transaction belongs to.

StudentID.description:
The unique identifier of the student that the transaction belongs to.  The student must
belong to the family specified in the FamilyID field.

Amount.description: The monetary amount of the transaction.

Timestamp.description: The date and time on which the transaction ocurred.

ChargeOrDiscountTransactionInputItem.description: Contains data that is used to create a new transaction of type Charge or Discount.

EventCategoryID.description:
The unique identifier of the event category that the transaction belongs to.  If this
field is set to null, then the transaction will not be assigned to an event category.

TeacherID.description:
The unique identifier of the teacher that the transaction belongs to.  If this
field is set to null, then the transaction will not be assigned to a teacher.

Taxes.description: A collection containing the taxes that are associated with the transaction.

TransactionType.description: An enumeration value that identifies the type of the transaction.

FamilyID.description: The unique identifier of the family that the transaction belongs to.

StudentID.description:
The unique identifier of the student that the transaction belongs to.  The student must
belong to the family specified in the FamilyID field.

Amount.description: The monetary amount of the transaction.

Timestamp.description: The date and time on which the transaction ocurred.

TransactionSearchOptions.description: Contains filter criteria that are applied when searching for transactions.

FamilyIDs.description: Filters the search by transactions that are assigned to the specified families.

StudentIDs.description: Filters the search by transactions that are assigned to the specified students.

EventCategoryIDs.description: Filters the search by transactions that are assigned to the specified event categories.

SearchText.description:
Filters the search by the specified text contained in the family name, transaction
description or event category name.

SearchAmount.description:
Filters the search by the monetary amount of the transaction.  If this field is set
to null, then transactions with any monetary amount are included.

TransactionTypes.description: The types of transactions to include in the search results. If null or empty, all transactions will be included.

MinDate.description:
The minimum date for which to get transactions.  If this field is set to null, then
no minimum date filter is applied.

MaxDate.description:
The maximum date for which to get transactions.  If this field is set to null, then
no maximum date filter is applied.

ZeroAmount.description:
Set to true to include transactions that have a monetary amount of zero. Set to false to exclude transactions with a monetary amount of zero.
Set to null to include all transactions (zero and non-zero).

TransactionDeleteOptions.description: Contains criteria that define how a transaction is deleted.

DeleteFutureTransactions.description:
When set to true, deletes all future transactions that are related to the transaction
being deleted.

TransactionUpdateItem.description: Contains data that is used to update an existing transaction.

TransactionType.description: An enumeration value that identifies the type of the transaction.

FamilyID.description: The unique identifier of the family that the transaction belongs to.

StudentID.description:
The unique identifier of the student that the transaction belongs to.  The student must
belong to the family specified in the FamilyID field.

Amount.description: The monetary amount of the transaction.

Timestamp.description: The date and time on which the transaction ocurred.

BalanceSummaryRequestItem.description: Contains criteria for obtaining the balance for a family.

FamilyID.description: The unique identifier of the family for which to get the balance.

BalanceAsOfDate.description: The date on which to get the balance.

FamilyBalancesRequestItem.description: Contains criteria for obtaining the balance for a family.

FamilyIDs.description: The list of unique identifier of the family for which to get the balance.

BalanceAsOfDate.description: The date on which to get the balance.

TransactionSummarySearchOptions.description: Contains filter criteria that are applied when searching for a summary of transactions.

FamilyIDs.description: Filters the search by transactions that are assigned to the specified families.

StudentIDs.description: Filters the search by transactions that are assigned to the specified students.

EventCategoryIDs.description: Filters the search by transactions that are assigned to the specified event categories.

SearchText.description:
Filters the search by the specified text contained in the family name, transaction
description or event category name.

SearchAmount.description:
Filters the search by the monetary amount of the transaction.  If this field is set
to null, then transactions with any monetary amount are included.

TransactionTypes.description: The types of transactions to include in the search results. If null or empty, all transactions will be included.

MinDate.description:
The minimum date for which to get transactions.  If this field is set to null, then
no minimum date filter is applied.

MaxDate.description:
The maximum date for which to get transactions.  If this field is set to null, then
no maximum date filter is applied.

ZeroAmount.description:
Set to true to include transactions that have a monetary amount of zero. Set to false to exclude transactions with a monetary amount of zero.
Set to null to include all transactions (zero and non-zero).

SendTransactionReceiptInputItem.description:
Contains data that is used to send a transaction receipt from a teacher to a parent via email
and optionally, SMS.

RecipientParentID.description: The unique identifier of the parent that will receive the transaction receipt.

SendEmailMessage.description: Set to true if the transaction receipt is to be sent via an email.

UseEmailTemplateSubjectAndBody.description:
If set to true, then the email body and subject from the default template are used.
If set to false, then the EmailBody field and EmailSubject fields are used.

EmailSubject.description:
The subject of the email.  This field should be set to null if the UseEmailTemplateSubjectAndBody
field is set to true.

EmailBody.description:
The content of the email.  This field should be set to null if the UseEmailTemplateSubjectAndBody
field is set to true.

BCCEmailToTeacher.description: Set to true if the teacher who is sending the email is to be blind carbon copied.

SendSMSMessage.description: Set to true if the transaction receipt is also to be sent via an SMS.

UseSMSTemplateBody.description:
If set to true, then the SMS content from the default template is used.
If set to false, then the SMSBody field is used.

SMSBody.description:
The content of the SMS.  This field should be set to null if the UseSMSTemplateBody
field is set to true.

ContactFormInputItem.description:
This class acts as the input item to generate a new message to the school from a user (potential student)
It is generated by the Contact Form in Website
